instructions: 1. If you do not have ready clasps or cut round sandwich breads into two, then hold about 40 minutes until you get coloured in the oven in the pre-heated 120 degree.
2. Crush or reinde cheese with fork.

deep-dish-granny-smith-apple-pie.name: Deep Dish Granny Smith Apple Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Peel, core, and halve apples. Cut into 1/2-inch slices, then slice into 1/2-inch cubes. Combine sugar, butter, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt together in a large bowl; add apples and toss to coat evenly. Add flour and toss again to distribute.
Pour apple mixture into 1 pie crust. Roll out 2nd pie crust, top pie, and pinch crust edges together.
Place pie on baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 45 minutes.

deep-fried-beets-with-horseradish-dip.name: Deep-fried Beets With Horseradish Dip
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Place beets in a shallow baking dish. Drizzle with 2 Tbsp. olive oil; season with salt and pepper. Add 1/2 cup water to dish, cover with foil, and roast until beets are tender (a paring knife inserted into center should meet no resistance), 40–50 minutes. Let beets cool slightly, then peel skins.
Meanwhile, stir sour cream and horseradish in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper; chill.
Whisk shallot, vinegar, mustard, and remaining 1/4 cup olive oil in a medium bowl; season marinade with salt and pepper. Add beets and toss to coat.
Place flour in a shallow dish; season with salt and pepper. Lightly beat eggs in a second shallow dish to blend. Place breadcrumbs in a third shallow dish; season with salt and pepper.

Fit a large heavy pot with thermometer and pour in enough oil to measure 2". Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 350°. Working with a few at a time, remove beets from marinade, letting excess drip back into bowl. Dredge in flour, shaking off excess. Dip in eggs, letting excess drip back into bowl, then roll in breadcrumbs to coat. Fry beets, turning occasionally, until breading is golden brown all over, about 2 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain; season with salt.
Serve fried beets with reserved horseradish dip alongside.
Do ahead: Beets can be marinated 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

delicious-beet-hummus-comedera.name: Delicious Beet Hummus
instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta agregando a la licuadora las dos tazas de garbanzos cocidos.
Take your beets and cut them into four portions. Add them to the blender.
Now, add tahini and olive oil.
Then add chili flakes, salt and pepper.
It proceeds to liquefied until everything's well integrated.
If you notice that your cream needs water and it's very dense, you can add it a little progressively.
El hummus debe estar bien integrado, cremoso y sin un grumo.
Enjoy!

delicious-chicken-and-beef-chimichangas-.original_name: Deliciosas chimichangas de pollo y res

ingredients.item: 250 gr de pollo cocido y desmenuzado
250 gr de carne cocina y deshebrada

instructions: Begins the recipe and heats a frying pan with a spoonful of oil.
Later, add onion and garlic. Flow for 4 minutes.
Luego, agrega el tomate y el chipotle adobado, mezcla y cocina durante 3 minutos.
Now, add the chicken, tomato sauce and salt to your taste. Meg and cook till the chicken's juicy but without that much water.
Apaga y reserva.
For meat, warm a frying pan with oil and later add onion, garlic and jalapeno. Mix and cook for 4 minutes.
Agrega el tomate picado, la carne de res deshebrada, sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla y cocina durante 5 minutos. Apaga y reserva.
Now, to put together the chimichanga, slightly heat up the corn flour tortillas and start riding.
Una primero la tortilla con los frijoles refritos.
Posteriormente, rellena con pollo o carne.
Proceed and wrapped up with an inside and closed with a stick. Repeat with the other omelets.
Warm up a frying pan with enough vegetable oil.
Once hot, place the chimichanga and start frying evenly till they daren. That's hot cooking so don't get their looks off them.
Remove your chimichanga from frying pan and place them in a paper napkin to remove excess oil.
They are now ready to taste with guacamole, lettuce and minced cilantro, salsa and lemon.
Enjoy!

delicious-spinach-meatball-soup-recipe-c.name: Delicious Spinach Meatball Soup Recipe
delicious-spinach-meatball-soup-recipe-c.original_name: Deliciosa receta de sopa de albóndigas con espinacas

ingredients.item: 500 g de carne molida de res o mezcla de res y cerdo
1/4  de taza de queso parmesano rallado

instructions: In a big bowl, mix ground meat with egg, frosted bread, parmesan cheese, minced garlic, salt, pepper and oregano. Mix well until all ingredients are uniformly integrated.
Form small meatballs the size of a nut and reserve.

In a big frying pan, heat up some olive oil at medium heat. Add the meatballs and cook them till they're golden all over them. They don't have to be completely cooked as they'll end up frying their soup. Take your meatballs and put them back.
In the same frying pan, add some more oil if necessary and pits onion, carrot and celery till they are tender, about 5 minutes.
Fold the meat stock and lead to boiling. It reduces fire and lets it simmer.
Add meatballs to soup and cook with low heat for about 20 minutes.
It incorporates spinach and cooks for another 5 minutes till spinach softens and meatballs are fully cooked.
Test and adjust the date with salt and pepper to suit.
Sirve caliente, idealmente con un poco de pan crujiente al lado para absorber el delicioso caldo.

deviled-eggs-and-pickled-beets.name: Deviled Eggs And Pickled Beets
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Wrap beets in foil, crimping tightly to seal; place on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast until tender, 45–55 minutes. Let stand until cool enough to handle. Peel beets and cut into 1" slices. Transfer to a wide, shallow container.

Bring vinegar, sugar, coriander seeds, mustard seeds, cloves, bay leaf, 1/4 tsp. sea salt, and 1/2 cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Simmer for 10 minutes; pour liquid over beets. Let cool to room temperature, then cover and refrigerate overnight, turning occasionally.

Slice eggs lengthwise in half and spoon yolks into a bowl. Mash yolks with a fork, then stir in the mayonnaise. Press mixture through a strainer into a small bowl. Add 1 Tbsp. strained beet-pickling juice, horseradish, and a pinch of salt. Spoon or pipe mixture into each egg white.
Finely dice enough drained pickled beets to yield about 1/2 cup (reserve any remaining beets for another use). Garnish each egg with diced beets and chives.

dog-liver-bites.name: Dog Liver Bites
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch square baking dish and line it with parchment paper.
Add oats to the bowl of a food processor; pulse until finely chopped, 10 to 15 seconds. Transfer oats to a large bowl and mix in flour.
Place livers in the food processor and process until smooth, 10 to 15 seconds. Add eggs and blend until well combined, about 10 seconds. Add oil and process until incorporated.
Add liver mixture to oat and flour mixture; stir until well blended. Spoon into the prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until firm to the touch but not hard and crispy, 30 to 40 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely before cutting into 50 pieces.

dried-fruit-compote-with-ginger-syrup.name: Dried Fruit Compote With Ginger Syrup
instructions: Bring ginger beer, dried fruit, and 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Reduce heat to low and simmer until liquid becomes syrupy and mixture is reduced to 1 1/2 cups, 35–40 minutes. Let cool completely. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

dry-noodle-recipe-with-bean-sauce-comede.name: Dry Noodle Recipe With Bean Sauce
dry-noodle-recipe-with-bean-sauce-comede.original_name: Receta de fideo seco con salsa de frijol

Una vez listos los ingredientes mezcla y deja cocinar durante 5 minutos o hasta que cambie de color.
En una olla a fuego medio agrega aceite y dora los fideos.
When the noodles are golden pour the salsa, mix well and cover the pot. Let them cook at medium low heat for 10 to 15 minutes or till they are semisecas.
Agrega la taza de frijoles negros enteros sin el caldo y mezcla.
In a previously greased mold, put the noodle and spread evenly. Hornea for 10 minutes at 182 been 3 been.
Decorate and decorate with sour cream, fresh cheese and cilantro. Enjoy!

duck-and-mushroom-risotto-recipe-comeder.original_name: Receta de risotto de pato y setas

Add the rice and mix. Gather the white wine and cook till the alcohol evaporate.
Once the liquid has been reduced, pour some of the stock and cook the risk over medium heat while still moving.
You have to progressively add the broth and cook with medium heat while still mingling.
When you have that creamy texture, add the butter tablespoon and parmesan cheese, mix up.

dutch-oven-crunchy-corned-beef.name: Dutch Oven Crunchy Corned Beef

ingredients.item: Corned beef brisket with spice packet

instructions: Place corned beef brisket and spice packet in a large Dutch oven with water to cover. Add ale, onion, chiles, garlic, cinnamon sticks, peppercorns, and bay leaves. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 4 to 5 hours.

Combine brown sugar, cloves, ginger, mustard, celery salt, and caraway seeds in a small bowl. Remove corned beef from the cooking liquid and discard aromatics. Rub brown sugar mixture onto the cooked corned beef while still hot.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Place the coated corned beef on the hot grill and cook until the coating is crunchy, 5 to 10 minutes.
